video_title: How To Use The New Netflix Experience
reply_text: I certainly wouldn't want to persuade anyone not to cancel their subscription, I agree this is what the company deserves for this awful update, but if it's just the user interface that you hate and you are on Google TV/Android TV, you can just as well revert to an earlier version with the pre-update UI instead. Just go into your app settings, "uninstall updates" for Netflix, and turn off automatic updates in Google Play. This is what I did just now, and it worked perfectly on my Bravia. It reverted to v9.0.1 and restored the usual, less awful UI. There's no "leaving soon" section for some reason, which was already there for some time before the UI update, but there is "continue watching", "my list", "coming soon" (for whoever wants that, I don't for one), all is good again. I hate automatic updates in general with a passion, 99% of the time they only cause inconvenience and remove existing functionality to force you to pay for something that you received for free earlier. You can always update an application manually if it isn't working properly (and only then).
